parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-opus-4-5",
  "max_tokens": 4096,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Write a 1500-word SEO blog post in English for Malta real estate agents about: {{ $json.topic }}

Target keyword: {{ $json.keyword }}

Format as MDX with this exact frontmatter:
---
title: "[compelling title with keyword]"
date: "{{ $now.format('YYYY-MM-DD') }}"
description: "[150-160 char meta description with keyword]"
keyword: "{{ $json.keyword }}"
category: "education"
ogImage: "/og-default.jpg"
---

Requirements:
- Use H2 and H3 headings for structure
- Include practical, actionable advice specific to Malta
- Reference Maltese regulations, market conditions, or geography where relevant
- Include a CTA at the end: [Join the REAPA waitlist →](https://reapa-mvp.vercel.app)
- Write for an audience of professional real estate agents, not buyers
- Optimize for the target keyword naturally throughout
- Do not use placeholder text — write real, valuable content"
    }
  ]
}
